title: Matthew Tonlagha 50th Birthday Celebrations - FinancialEDGE
description: Photo Caption; L-R: Chairman of Maton Engineering Nigeria Limited, Mr. Matthew Tonlagha, Dr. Esther Tonlagha, Honourable Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister for the Economy Chief Wale Edun, his wife Amy Adwoa Edun and Commissioner for Youth Kogi State Hon. Monday Anyebe during a Thanksgiving service to mark the 50th birthday celebration of Mr. Tonlagha
html:
Photo Caption; L-R: Chairman of Maton Engineering Nigeria Limited, Mr. Matthew Tonlagha, Dr. Esther Tonlagha, Honourable Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister for the Economy Chief Wale Edun, his wife Amy Adwoa Edun and Commissioner for Youth Kogi State Hon. Monday Anyebe during a Thanksgiving service to mark the 50th birthday celebration of Mr. Tonlagha in Warri, Sunday
